projects.title: Intelligent Lead Management System
projects.description: Automated lead capture from Gmail, enrichment through multiple APIs, and intelligent routing to Asana with Google Drive document management.

images.altText: n8n workflow for Ready to Start status
images.caption: Complete n8n workflow automation for processing Ready to Start leads
Automated workflow branch for handling leads with no response
Workflow automation for leads that have been quoted
Automated processing workflow for approved project leads

images.altText: Final workflow - Paid and Closed status
images.caption: Complete workflow cycle ending with paid and closed lead status

highlights: 95% reduction in manual lead processing time
Automatic lead scoring and qualification
Seamless CRM integration with document management
Real-time notifications and task assignment
workflowSteps: Monitor Gmail for new lead emails
Extract contact information using AI parsing
Enrich leads with external API data
Score leads based on predefined criteria
Create Asana tasks with enriched data
Store relevant documents in Google Drive
Send notifications to sales team

projects.title: AI Email Personalization System
projects.description: Advanced AI-powered email personalization platform that generates highly targeted, context-aware marketing emails using OpenAI GPT-4, with comprehensive data validation, error handling, and performance analytics for UAE-based Reno renovation platform.

images.altText: AI Email Personalization System workflow overview
images.caption: Complete AI-powered email personalization workflow with OpenAI integration

highlights: AI-powered email content generation using OpenAI GPT-4
Context-aware personalization based on industry and location
Comprehensive data validation and error handling
Real-time cost tracking and performance analytics
Fallback email templates for reliability
UAE market-specific content optimization
workflowSteps: Ingest and validate contact data from multiple sources
Build personalization context with industry and location data
Generate AI-powered email content using OpenAI GPT-4
Parse and structure email subject lines and body content
Deliver personalized emails via Gmail API
Track delivery costs and performance metrics
Handle validation errors with fallback templates
Aggregate results and calculate campaign analytics

projects.title: Email-SMS AI Trello Automation
projects.description: Intelligent communication management system that processes SMS messages and emails through AI analysis, automatically creates and manages Trello cards based on content priority, client identification, and urgency detection.

images.altText: Email-SMS AI Trello Automation workflow overview
images.caption: Complete n8n workflow for intelligent SMS and email processing with Trello integration

highlights: Intelligent SMS content validation and processing
AI-powered client identification from phone numbers
Automatic priority detection using keyword analysis
Smart Trello card creation with context-aware routing
Real-time communication processing and error handling
Dynamic board and list assignment based on client profiles
workflowSteps: Receive SMS messages via VoIP webhook integration
Validate SMS content and sender information
Perform client lookup with phone number normalization
Apply AI-powered priority classification using content analysis
Route messages to appropriate Trello boards and lists
Create structured Trello cards with client context
Handle errors with comprehensive logging and fallback processing
Send confirmation notifications and track processing metrics

projects.title: Doctor Appointment System
projects.description: Comprehensive healthcare appointment management platform with intelligent sub-workflow orchestration for scheduling, rescheduling, confirmation, and cancellation processes, featuring advanced error handling, alternative slot suggestions, and multi-channel communication.

images.altText: Main Doctor Appointment System workflow with sub-workflows
images.caption: Complete healthcare appointment management system with intelligent sub-workflow routing
Advanced appointment scheduling logic with availability checking and alternative suggestions
Intelligent rescheduling system with conflict resolution and patient communication
Appointment confirmation workflow with validation and notification systems
Comprehensive cancellation processing with reason tracking and slot management

highlights: Modular sub-workflow architecture for scalable appointment management
Intelligent appointment type classification (schedule, reschedule, cancel, confirm)
Advanced availability checking with alternative slot suggestions
Multi-channel patient communication via SMS and Slack notifications
Comprehensive error handling with user-friendly messaging
Healthcare-compliant data validation and processing
Real-time appointment status tracking and analytics
workflowSteps: Receive appointment requests through secure webhook endpoint
Classify request type using intelligent routing logic
Execute specialized sub-workflows for each appointment action
Validate patient data and appointment requirements
Check doctor availability and suggest alternatives if needed
Process appointment changes with conflict resolution
Send multi-channel notifications via SMS and Slack
Update appointment database with comprehensive tracking
Generate error responses with actionable patient guidance
Compile analytics and performance metrics
